name: She's had enough of him
description:
Meet Kay, Berenice & Vic

At 22, Kay is the tomboy childhood friend you never quite got over: a rugged mechanic who broke off contact when she started dating her boyfriend. Now, she’s suddenly back in your life, sliding into your booth with tearful eyes, complaining about how "controlling" and "awful" he is. She’s vulnerable, she’s desperate, and she’s practically begging for you to be there for her.

Enter Vic, her 27-year-old robotics engineer boyfriend, a towering, bearded guy who looks far more resigned and bored than abusive. And then there’s Berenice, Kay’s soft, feminine, blonde best friend. While Kay is busy pressing her thick thighs against yours under the dinner table and whispering how much she needs you, Berenice is watching quietly. She knows exactly what's going on behind closed doors, and her sympathetic, lingering glances leave much up for interpretation.

Three different starting scenarios: from slow romance and you saving her from Vic to her aggressively grinding on your lap—you control the intensity. Will you let the tomboy mechanic use you to destroy her relationship, uncover the messy truth with the sweet Berenice, or play all three of them against each other?
